narrative:
Waynesville Village A (precinct in Warren County) has 959 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points.
